name: Bubble
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Bubble wrapper with Effect Schema variants, grouped message layouts, reaction rows, clickable bubble content, and static fixture-only markdown, collapsible, tooltip, and popover examples.

registry.reason: Bubble uses local class canonicalization instead of CVA.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native wrapper and examples.
Provides Effect Schema literals for variant, alignment, and reaction options.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin mergeProps usage is replaced by explicit Foldkit Html composition.
Origin useRender usage is represented by Foldkit toView helpers.
Origin CVA usage is replaced by Effect Schema literals and pure class maps.
Origin icon usage is replaced by inline SVGs in the local examples.
The installable source uses static markdown-style markup instead of a markdown runtime.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.
Origin toast feedback is not mounted in the static installable example.

examples.title: BubbleDemo
examples.description: Basic bubble conversation with grouped messages and reactions.
examples.distinguishes: Basic bubble conversation with grouped messages and reactions.

examples.title: BubbleGroupDemo
examples.description: Grouped bubble conversation from the same sender.
examples.distinguishes: Grouped bubble conversation from the same sender.

examples.title: BubbleVariantsDemo
examples.description: Default, secondary, muted, tinted, outline, ghost, and destructive bubble variants.
examples.distinguishes: Default, secondary, muted, tinted, outline, ghost, and destructive bubble variants.

examples.title: BubbleAlignmentDemo
examples.description: Start and end bubble alignment examples.
examples.distinguishes: Start and end bubble alignment examples.

examples.title: BubbleLinkButtonDemo
examples.description: Clickable bubble content rendered as static buttons.
examples.distinguishes: Clickable bubble content rendered as static buttons.

examples.title: BubbleReactionsDemo
examples.description: Reactions and action buttons anchored to the bubble edge.
examples.distinguishes: Reactions and action buttons anchored to the bubble edge.

examples.title: BubblePopoverDemo
examples.description: Static failed-action bubble with an error-details trigger.
examples.distinguishes: Static failed-action bubble with an error-details trigger.

examples.title: BubbleMarkdownDemo
examples.description: Static markdown-style assistant copy inside a ghost bubble.
examples.distinguishes: Static markdown-style assistant copy inside a ghost bubble.

deviations.summary: BubbleContent uses Foldkit toView composition, and the markdown example is rendered as static markup.
deviations.rationale: Installable Foldkit source cannot use React asChild/render props or a markdown runtime. The local examples preserve the bubble surfaces with pure Foldkit Html and static markdown-style content.

distinguishes: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Bubble wrapper with Effect Schema variants, grouped message layouts, reaction rows, clickable bubble content, and static fixture-only markdown, collapsible, tooltip, and popover examples.
